results.title: Nifty Outlook for June 22: 24,000 remains the key for index as US-Iran uncertainties remain
results.description: The Nifty snapped its five-session winning streak on Friday, weighed down by a sharp selloff in information technology stocks. Despite the weakness, the benchmark managed to hold above the psychologically important 24,000 level and ended the week with gains of 1.65%.
